# Usage Example:

**Query with Responsive Design Requirements:**
> Use bootstrap-generator skill to get CSS framework architecture guidance for implementing Bootstrap 5 components with responsive design and utility-first approach.
**带响应式设计要求的提问：**
> 使用 bootstrap-generator skill，获取关于实现 Bootstrap 5 组件的 CSS 框架架构指导，包含响应式设计和工具优先方法。
